conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990.
org_constraint: Maintain a formal tone throughout the email.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "Hey there, can you help me out?"
instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990. Maintain a formal tone throughout the email. The email must include the phrase "Hey there, can you help me out?"
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Archived Newspapers from 1990

Dear [Library Name] Staff,

I am writing to formally request assistance in accessing archived newspapers from the year 1990. I am conducting research for [briefly state the purpose of your research, e.g., an academic paper, a personal project, historical study] and require specific publications from that year.

Could you please advise on the procedures for requesting and accessing these materials? I would be grateful if you could inform me about the availability of the 1990 archives, whether they are digitized, and what steps I need to take to view or obtain copies.

While I must maintain a formal tone throughout this correspondence, I must admit that I am quite eager to begin this research, so, hey there, can you help me out?

If there are specific forms I need to complete, or if there are associated fees for accessing these historical records, please let me know at your earliest convenience.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance with this matter. I look forward to your reply.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Title/Affiliation, if applicable]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
